$comment: Template for .mcp.json (the real .mcp.json is gitignored). Copy it to .mcp.json — it works as-is, no secrets or machine paths. Server name = MCP tool prefix (e.g. 'codegraph' -> mcp__codegraph__*). Requires `codegraph` and `serena` on PATH (installed under ~/.local/bin); both follow the client's working directory, so the same entry serves the canonical checkout and any worktree. Build the indexes once with scripts/code-intel-init.sh.

args: export PATH="$PATH:$HOME/.local/bin"; exec serena start-mcp-server --context ide-assistant
